summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Core MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (IEMG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of emerging-market firms, covering 99% of market capitalization. IEMG was launched on Oct 18, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.

holdings.infoBox: IEMG is an equity ETF with a total of 2859 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 13.83%, Samsung Electronics at 5.91%, SK hynix at 5.04%, Tencent Holdings at 2.79%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.83%.
